title: ONE Fight Night 43: Tang vs. Gasanov

posts.author: Tapology
posts.body: The official Tapology discussion thread for the event!

posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 2 of 2 Pending | Tied for 1st with 145 others Tang vs. GasanovShamil Gasanov, SUB, R4Gasanov has high level bjj but against good comp he’s really boring. He lowkey looked bad against tonon in the rematch and I think you could even argue he lost that one. He doesn’t strike or do any damage at all, but he is a very good grappler. Tang has sick striking and good cardio so I think he could cause issues here, but I am worried about him stopping the wrestling. If this stays standing I think he can cookSaruta vs. HenriqueYosuke Saruta, DECHenrique is younger with the better record but he is a fraud imo. His record is very padded and he’s coming off of a loss where he got outhustled everywhere. Saruta is old but he had a close fight in his last bout and has only been losing to the top guys in one
